moderation_begin_message:
☑️ Almost ready!
Your profile has been submitted for review.
We'll notify you when moderation is complete.
moderation_failed_message:
😱 Oops, something's wrong…
Your profile was rejected by the moderator.
Check the app for details.
photo_update_moderation_start_message:
🔎 Your photo has been submitted for moderation!
We'll notify you when the results are ready
photo_update_moderation_fail_message:
🚨 Your photo didn't pass our moderation!
Please upload a different photo.
bad_photo_quality:
❌ Your photo was uploaded in low quality!
Please upload a higher quality photo!
face_not_detected:
🛑 Photos detected where the face is not visible.
Please upload correct images!
nsfw_content:
⚠️ We detected that the uploaded image contains inappropriate content.
Please remove it and upload a photo with appropriate content!
bot_notification.new_likes.one:
❤️ You have :count new like!
Someone clearly liked you
bot_notification.new_likes.few:
🩷 You have :count new likes!
Interest in you is growing
bot_notification.new_likes.many:
🤍 You have :count new likes!
You're in the spotlight today
✨
bot_notification.new_matches.one:
💞 You have :count new match!
Looks like you liked each other
premium_started_message:
👑 Your Premium subscription is activated!
All app features are now available to you 🤍
premium_expired_message:
⏰ Your Premium subscription has expired
Renew your subscription to restore full functionality!
account_deleted_by_admin_message:
🚩 Your profile has been deleted by the Administrator!
If you believe this is a mistake, please try to register again.
start_message: 🤍 PlusDate — a modern way to meet people right in Telegram: no lengthy registration, no extra apps, just comfort!
validation.premium_required: Premium subscription is required to respond to likes
